# AgriTech-ONE Scientiae-Naturalis Conference 2026

> International Scientific Conference on Agrifood, Biotech & AI
> Satellite Event of the European Climate Pact
> 100% Remote & Asynchronous · July–October 2026

## About

AgriTech-ONE is a diamond open access global scientific conference focused on Agriculture,Food, Biotechnology and AI. It is a Satellite Event of the European Climate Pact and addresses war-driven and climate-driven food crises through evidence-based scientific dialogue. The conference is fully remote and asynchronous, designed to include researchers from conflict-affected regions and the Global South.

## Key Dates

- Abstract Submission Deadline: 25 May 2026
- Notification of Acceptance: 15 June 2026
- Conference Launch: 10 July 2026
- Post-Conference Period Closes: 10 October 2026

## Submission & Participation

- Article Processing Charge (APC): €100 / USD 100
- 12 full scholarships available for participants from Low-Income Countries and the Global South
- Submission email: scientiae-naturalis-registration@yahoo.com
- Accepted formats: Digital Posters (A0 PPTX), Video Presentations (MP4, 10–15 min), Rapid Innovation Reports (PDF), 5-Minute Pitches
- Languages accepted: English, French, Spanish
- Every accepted submission receives a unique DOI
- Proceedings published with ISBN and ISSN, indexed on Google Scholar

## Thematic Areas

1. Climate Change Adaptation in Crop & Forestry Sectors
2. Resource-Use Efficiency in Crops, Aquaculture & Livestock
3. Social and Economic Impacts for Smallholders
4. Climate Change Adaptation in Livestock and Fishery Sectors
5. Post-Production Value Addition and Food Safety
6. Public Policies, Strategies and Regulations
7. Tech-to-Market / AI-Driven Sustainability
8. Sustainable Agriculture & Agroecology
9. Digitalisation, Precision Agriculture & EU Policy

## Contact

- Registration & Participation: scientiae-naturalis-registration@yahoo.com
- Journal & Publications: scientiae-naturalis-journal@yahoo.com
- Marketing & Partnerships: scientiae-naturalis-marketing@yahoo.com

## Certifications & Standards

ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, IQNET · ORCID Compliant · EU Metadata Standards · Google Scholar Indexed · Blockchain-verified Certificates of Participation

## Organisational Notes

- Organised by: Scientiae Naturalis partner consortium
- Volunteer reviewer team: 120 researchers and practitioners globally
- Peer review: double-blind, 3 reviewers per submission
- Partner institutions include: Wageningen University & Research, CGIAR, University of Ghana, Ethiopian Institute of Agricultural Research, Universidad Nacional Agraria La Molina, ICAR, Université de Montpellier, IRRI, FAO
